domain: automotive service tools, inspection aids, brackets, jigs, and repair hardware

ideas.product_context: Automotive brake service tool used when retracting rear brake caliper pistons with integrated parking brake mechanisms.
ideas.core_function: Engages the piston face slots while transmitting axial pressure and rotation from a service wrench or press tool.
ideas.likely_main_part: Cylindrical adapter puck with opposing drive lugs, central square-drive socket, chamfered rim, and relief grooves.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires precise coaxial features, raised lugs on a circular face, socket geometry, chamfers, and functional clearances between shallow and deep features.

ideas.product_context: Exhaust repair tool for removing oxygen sensors in tight engine bays without disconnecting the wiring harness first.
ideas.core_function: Grips the hex body of an oxygen sensor while leaving a side slot for the sensor wire to pass through.
ideas.likely_main_part: Offset crowfoot-style wrench head with hex bore, open cable slot, square-drive boss, and reinforced curved neck.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines interrupted hex geometry, asymmetric openings, load-bearing transitions, bosses, and nontrivial wall thickness constraints.

ideas.product_context: Drivetrain service fixture used to crimp ear-style CV boot clamps consistently during axle repair.
ideas.core_function: Supports the clamp ear and guides plier jaws so the crimp closes to a repeatable height without damaging the boot.
ideas.likely_main_part: Small hardened anvil block with contoured saddle, clamp-ear pocket, jaw guide channels, and mounting holes.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests concave saddles, small radiused pockets, parallel guide features, compact hole placement, and service-clearance-driven geometry.

ideas.product_context: Hub repair hardware used with a shop press or C-clamp tool to remove and install wheel studs without bending the hub flange.
ideas.core_function: Supports the hub around the stud head while leaving clearance for the stud to pass through during pressing.
ideas.likely_main_part: Thick annular cup with stepped bore, relieved side window, flange contact face, and anti-slip outer flats.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Includes nested cylindrical bores, stepped internal cavities, side cutouts, thick-section proportions, and datum-critical bearing surfaces.

ideas.idea_title: Tie Rod End Taper Inspection Gauge
ideas.product_context: Steering inspection aid for checking whether a tie rod end taper or steering knuckle bore is worn beyond acceptable fit.
ideas.core_function: Provides reference taper surfaces and depth marks to compare seating depth and contact pattern.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined tapered plug gauge with shoulder stop, engraved depth bands, knurled grip section, and flat reference face.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests tapered solids, shoulder transitions, engraved or recessed markings, mixed grip textures, and tolerance-sensitive reference surfaces.

ideas.product_context: Suspension service tool for opening the clamping slot on MacPherson strut knuckles during strut removal.
ideas.core_function: Slides into the knuckle slot and expands it a controlled amount without over-spreading or gouging the casting.
ideas.likely_main_part: Tapered wedge with rounded nose, stop shoulder, wrench flats, and shallow retention groove.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Uses tapered prismatic geometry, rounded leading surfaces, functional stops, flats on angled bodies, and stress-aware transitions.

ideas.product_context: Brake inspection aid for mounting a dial indicator to a suspension upright or caliper bracket when measuring rotor runout.
ideas.core_function: Clamps to an irregular service location and provides a rigid adjustable mount for an indicator stem.
ideas.likely_main_part: Split clamp block with V-groove jaw, cross-bolt slot, indicator stem bore, and perpendicular locking screw boss.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Challenges representation of split bodies, V-grooves, intersecting bores, clamp slots, bosses, and perpendicular fastening features.

ideas.product_context: Engine service jig for extracting stuck fuel injectors from a cylinder head without prying against fragile plastic or aluminum surfaces.
ideas.core_function: Spans across nearby head features and guides a pull screw aligned with the injector axis.
ideas.likely_main_part: Rigid bridge bar with arched center clearance, adjustable foot pads, threaded pull-screw boss, and elongated mounting slots.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines arched relief geometry, slots, threaded boss placement, planar support feet, and alignment-critical central features.

ideas.product_context: Exhaust service hand tool for pushing rubber exhaust isolators off welded hanger rods.
ideas.core_function: Captures the hanger rod while applying force to the rubber isolator face without tearing it.
ideas.likely_main_part: Forked pry head with semicircular rod notch, broad curved pusher face, offset handle socket, and reinforced ribs.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests forked negative spaces, curved contact faces, socket-to-head offsets, ribbed reinforcement, and ergonomic service geometry.

ideas.product_context: Body repair jig used when replacing worn door hinge pins and bushings on vehicles with heavy doors.
ideas.core_function: Holds the hinge leaves coaxial while guiding a replacement pin or reamer through both hinge barrels.
ideas.likely_main_part: Clamp-on alignment block with dual hinge-barrel saddles, guide bushing bore, tightening screw pads, and datum shoulders.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires coaxial guide features, paired saddles, clamp pads, shoulders, and constrained access geometry tied to a real repair workflow.
